{{nihongo|'''Wokunino Shrine'''|е∞ПеЬЛз•Юз§Њ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmy≈Нch≈Н]]. It is located in [[T≈Нt≈Нmi Province]].
